name: loop-it
description: Find, recommend, and run verifier-gated coding loops for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Find, recommend, and run agent loops.
interface.longDescription: Loop it packages a portable loop router, library, launcher, and Agent Skill that helps Codex inspect a codebase, pick the right verifier-gated loop, run bounded passes, stop on proof or blockers, and keep evidence logs.
defaultPrompt: Use $loop-it to inspect this repo and run the right repair loop.
Use $loop-it to fix this failing check with proof.
Use $loop-it to find the next actionable loop.
